name: alpaca-broker-api
description: Reads Alpaca Broker API accounts, assets, market calendar, clock, country info, account activities, journals, and per-account positions/watchlists/orders/documents over the Broker REST API (read-only).

risk.read: external Alpaca Broker API read of account/asset/market metadata, plus per-account trading positions, orders, watchlists, and document metadata (financial PII adjacent; no document content is downloaded, only listing metadata)
